scripts.dev: sh -c 'socket="$(pwd)/../proxy/.wrangler/docker-privileged.sock"; wait-for-socket "$socket" && DOCKER_HOST="unix://$socket" wrangler dev --config wrangler.local-actions.jsonc --port 8787 --inspector-port 9231'
scripts.dev:act: sh -c 'socket="$(pwd)/../proxy/.wrangler/docker-privileged.sock"; wait-for-socket "$socket" && DOCKER_HOST="unix://$socket" wrangler dev --config wrangler.act.jsonc --port 8787 --inspector-port 9231'
scripts.dev:agent-ci: sh -c 'socket="$(pwd)/../proxy/.wrangler/docker-privileged.sock"; wait-for-socket "$socket" && DOCKER_HOST="unix://$socket" wrangler dev --config wrangler.agent-ci.jsonc --port 8787 --inspector-port 9231'
scripts.dev:local-actions: sh -c 'socket="$(pwd)/../proxy/.wrangler/docker-privileged.sock"; wait-for-socket "$socket" && DOCKER_HOST="unix://$socket" wrangler dev --config wrangler.local-actions.jsonc --port 8787 --inspector-port 9231'
